ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Curated, install-ready skills for Hermes Agent (v0.17.0). 72 built-in + 101 optional bundled skills + 85 community skills, plugins & tools for the self-improving AI agent from Nous Research. Cross-compatible with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Cursor, and Windsurf.
